task_completion.description: Create the 'Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026' survey and 'Brand Dynamics' question group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey interface showing a survey titled 'Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026' and a question group named 'Brand Dynamics' in the survey structure menu.

task_completion.description: Create Q1_USE as a Multiple Choice question with the specified smartphone brands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'Q1_USE' of type 'Multiple choice'. The subquestions list should include Apple, Samsung, Google, Motorola, and Sony with codes SQ001-SQ005.

task_completion.description: Create Q2_REJECT as a Multiple Choice question with cascading exclusion logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'Q2_REJECT' of type 'Multiple choice'. In its Logic settings, the 'Array filter exclusion' field must be set to 'Q1_USE'.

task_completion.description: Create Q3_WHY as an Array question with cascading inclusion logic and specific X/Y axes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'Q3_WHY' of type 'Array'. The Y-axis (subquestions) should be the 5 brands, and the X-axis (answer options) should be 'Too Expensive', 'Poor Quality', 'Bad Design', and 'Privacy Concerns'. In its Logic settings, the 'Array filter' field must be set to 'Q2_REJECT'.
Look for a status indicator showing the survey is 'Active' (usually a green badge or checkmark) or a success screen confirming the survey has been activated.

integrity.description: The agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the LimeSurvey admin dashboard in a web browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the forms and saved the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing in text fields, adding subquestions/answer options, and clicking 'Save' buttons within the LimeSurvey interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is no browser developer console open modifying the DOM to falsely display the required question codes or logic settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026'. Question Codes: 'Q1_USE', 'Q2_REJECT', 'Q3_WHY'. Subquestion count for Q1 and Q2: exactly 5 (Apple, Samsung, Google, Motorola, Sony). Q2_REJECT must have its Array filter exclusion attribute set to 'Q1_USE'. Q3_WHY must have its Array filter attribute (inclusion) set to 'Q2_REJECT'.
